CustomField.formula:
IF(TEXT(HOMEtracker__Property_Type__c)="","-Add Property Type" &BR(),"") & IF(TEXT(Credit_Check_Required__c)="","-Add Credit Check Required" &BR(),"") &
/*IF(TEXT(Background_Check_Required__c)="","-Add Background Check Required" &BR(),"") &*/
IF(ISBLANK(Minimum_Credit_Score_to_be_Eligible__c),"-Add Min Credit Score" &BR(),"") & IF(AND(TEXT(Credit_Check_Required__c)="Yes",TEXT(Co_Signers_Allowed__c)=""),"-Add Co-Signers Allowed" &BR(),"") & IF(AND(TEXT(Rental_or_Sale_Development__c)="Sale",TEXT(Development_Financing_Requirements__c)=""),"-Add Development Financing Requirement" &BR(),"") & IF(ISBLANK(Utilities_Included__c),"-Add Utilities Included" &BR(),"") & IF(TEXT(Elevator__c)="","-Add Elevator" &BR(),"") & IF(TEXT(Smoking_Allowed__c)="","-Add Smoking" &BR(),"") & IF(AND(TEXT(Rental_or_Sale_Development__c)= "Rental", Security_deposit_required__c=""),"-Add Required Security Deposit" &BR(),"") & IF(Text(Required_Deposit__c)="","-Add Required Deposit" &BR(),"") & IF(ISPICKVAL(Age_Restriction__c,""),"-Add Age Restriction" & BR(),"") &
IF(ISBLANK(Number_of_units__c),"-Add Number of Units" &BR(),"") & IF(ISBLANK(Unit_Mix__c),"-Add Unit Mix" &BR(),"") & IF(ISBLANK(Affordability_restriction_del__c),"-Add Affordability Restriction" &BR(),"") & IF(TEXT(Rental_or_Sale_Development__c)="","-Add Rental or Sale Development Type" &BR(),"") & IF(NOT(ISBLANK(Development_address__c)),"-Remove Development" &BR(),"")
CustomField.label: Dev Data Check
